title: Digest — Mar 20, 2026, 07:11 PM UTC
summary:
# Pwarf Devlog Digest

Hello, fellow dwarven architects! Exciting updates have been brewed for you in the latest round of changes. Here’s a quick overview of what’s new and improved in Pwarf:

## Quality of Life Improvements
- **Digest Automation**: Improved CI workflows to allow the digest to push to the main branch every 5 minutes without requiring a passing CI. (PR #461)
- **Interactive Tutorial**: A new `?` button in the toolbar provides a 7-step guided tour of the key UI areas, enhancing user onboarding. (PR #462)

## Gameplay Features
- **Failed Task Recovery**: Tasks will now be reset to pending if a dwarf dies while working, allowing for better management of abandoned tasks. (PR #460)
- **Trade Caravan Arrivals**: Celebrate with periodic supply drops of Dwarven ale and other resources every 5 years! (PR #454)
- **Auto-Brew and Auto-Cook**: Your dwarves will now automatically brew drinks and cook meals when stocks are low, streamlining resource management. (PR #450, PR #451)

## Combat and Events
- **New World Events**: The game now features events for battles, sieges, and marriages, adding more depth to the Legends tab. (PR #458)
- **First Engagement Tracking**: Battle and monster siege events will now trigger on first contact between dwarves and monsters, enhancing the combat experience. (PR #449, PR #453)

## UI Enhancements
- **Dwarves’ Personality Traits**: Added OCEAN traits display in the DwarfModal, so you can get to know your dwarves better! (PR #444)
- **Improved Roster Appearance**: Skill stars are now displayed in the DwarfModal, and activity icons have been introduced in the roster. (PR #439)

## Simulation Adjustments
- **Fossilize Fortress on Fall**: Automatic creation and publishing of ruins when the last dwarf dies enhances the narrative experience. (PR #436)
- **Civilization Wealth Display**: Added a wealth indicator in the toolbar for better tracking of your civilization's resources. (PR #411)

## General Fixes and Tweaks
- The digest prompt has been truncated to comply with token limits, ensuring smoother operation. (PR #455)
- Multiple performance and interface fixes have been implemented to fight bugs and improve usability.

That’s it for this digest! Dive into the game and start building your legendary dwarf fortress today!

## Merged PRs
- #461
- #462
- #460
- #458
- #455

## Sim Health Check

Baseline scenario: 3 dwarves, 500 ticks (10 days)

- **Dwarves alive:** 3 / 3
- **Tasks completed:** 176
- **Avg stress:** 67.4
- **Deaths:**
  - No deaths
